description: Implement the Knowledge Base (Basis Pengetahuan) page with full CRUD functionality for training data management. Includes API routes and UI components for inputting, editing, categorizing, and previewing knowledge entries.
steps: Create API routes at src/app/api/knowledge/route.ts with GET (list with search, filter by category, pagination) and POST (create new entry) handlers following the pattern in src/app/api/stok/route.ts
Create API route at src/app/api/knowledge/[id]/route.ts with GET (single entry), PUT (update), and DELETE handlers

Create API route at src/app/api/knowledge/test/route.ts with POST handler that accepts a test question/scenario and returns a simulated agent response based on matching knowledge entries (simple keyword matching for now)

Create the main page at src/app/(dashboard)/pengetahuan/page.tsx as a server component that fetches knowledge entries and renders the page with tabs for different categories (Semua, Riwayat Chat, FAQ, Info Produk, SOP, Template Respons, Panduan Nada)

Create component src/app/(dashboard)/pengetahuan/components/KnowledgeList.tsx - client component displaying a searchable, filterable table/card list of knowledge entries with actions (edit, delete, toggle active)

Create component src/app/(dashboard)/pengetahuan/components/KnowledgeForm.tsx - client component with a dialog/form for creating and editing knowledge entries. Fields: title, content (textarea), category (select), tags (comma-separated input), source (optional)

Create component src/app/(dashboard)/pengetahuan/components/KnowledgePreview.tsx - client component with a test panel where admin can type a customer question and see how the agent would respond based on knowledge. Shows which knowledge entries were matched.
Create component src/app/(dashboard)/pengetahuan/components/KnowledgeStats.tsx - small stats cards showing total entries per category, active vs inactive count

Create component src/app/(dashboard)/pengetahuan/components/BulkImport.tsx - client component with a textarea for pasting bulk chat history or data with a simple parser that creates multiple entries at once
acceptance_criteria: Navigating to /pengetahuan shows the knowledge base page with category tabs
Admin can create a new knowledge entry with title, content, category, tags, and source
Admin can edit an existing knowledge entry inline or via dialog
Admin can delete a knowledge entry with confirmation
Admin can toggle knowledge entries active/inactive
Admin can filter by category and search by title/content
Admin can test the agent by typing a question and seeing a simulated response with matched knowledge entries
Admin can paste bulk chat history text and import it as multiple entries
All API routes return proper error responses for invalid data
verification: Run: npm run build - should compile without TypeScript errors
Run: npm run lint - should pass or show only pre-existing warnings
